all.en: Thank you for choosing Brightway Communications as your service provider.
all.zh: 感謝您選擇 Brightway Communications 作為您的服務供應商。

all.en: We are constantly looking for ways to improve the quality of our offerings.
all.zh: 我們持續尋求提升服務品質的方法。

all.en: Your honest feedback plays a critical role in helping us achieve this goal.
all.zh: 您誠實的意見回饋對我們達成目標至關重要。

all.en: We invite you to participate in our annual customer satisfaction survey.
all.zh: 我們誠摯邀請您參與年度顧客滿意度調查。

all.en: The survey contains approximately 20 questions and takes about eight minutes.
all.zh: 問卷共約 20 題，作答時間約八分鐘。

all.en: All responses will be kept strictly confidential and used only for internal analysis.
all.zh: 所有回覆將嚴格保密，僅作為內部分析之用。

all.en: Topics covered include product quality, customer service, and overall experience.
all.zh: 問卷主題包含產品品質、客戶服務與整體體驗。

all.en: You will also be asked about your most recent interaction with our team.
all.zh: 您也會被問及最近一次與我們團隊的互動經驗。

all.en: There are no right or wrong answers, so please share your true opinions.
all.zh: 問卷沒有對錯答案，請真實分享您的看法。

all.en: If a question does not apply to you, simply select the not applicable option.
all.zh: 若題目與您無關，請直接選擇「不適用」選項。

all.en: At the end of the survey, you may add open comments and suggestions.
all.zh: 在問卷最後，您可以留下開放式意見與建議。

all.en: Our management team personally reviews every comment we receive.
all.zh: 我們的管理團隊會親自審閱每一則收到的意見。

all.en: As a token of appreciation, all participants will receive a 15 percent coupon.
all.zh: 為表達感謝，所有參與者將獲得九折優惠券。

all.en: The coupon is valid for 90 days and can be used on any service plan.
all.zh: 優惠券有效期 90 天，可用於任何服務方案。

all.en: Ten respondents will also be randomly selected to win a premium gift basket.
all.zh: 我們也將隨機抽出十位填寫者贈送精選禮籃。

all.en: Winners will be notified by email within two weeks of survey closure.
all.zh: 得獎者將於問卷結束兩週內以電子郵件通知。

all.en: The survey link is available at the bottom of this email message.
all.zh: 問卷連結位於此電子郵件下方。

all.en: Please complete the survey before May 30 to be eligible for the prize draw.
all.zh: 請於五月三十日前完成問卷以符合抽獎資格。

all.en: If you experience any issues accessing the survey, contact our help desk.
all.zh: 若您在開啟問卷時遇到任何問題，請聯絡我們的服務台。

all.en: You can also call our toll-free line at 1-800-555-0142 for assistance.
all.zh: 您也可以撥打免付費專線 1-800-555-0142 取得協助。

all.en: Your input has guided many of our recent service improvements.
all.zh: 您的意見已促成我們近期多項服務改善。

all.en: Last year, customer comments led to faster billing and new payment options.
all.zh: 去年顧客的回饋促成更快的帳單流程與新增的付款方式。

all.en: We deeply value the time you take to share your experience with us.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝您撥冗分享您的體驗。

all.en: Thank you again for being a loyal customer of Brightway Communications.
all.zh: 再次感謝您成為 Brightway Communications 的忠實顧客。

all.en: Survey results from previous years are summarized on the transparency page of our website.
all.zh: 歷年問卷結果摘要公佈於本公司網站的透明度專區。

all.en: We benchmark our customer scores against industry averages to identify areas for growth.
all.zh: 我們會將顧客評分與業界平均比較，以找出可成長的領域。

all.en: A summary of this year's findings will be published in our quarterly newsletter.
all.zh: 本年度問卷結果摘要將刊登於本公司的季度電子報。

all.en: Customers who prefer paper forms may request a printed version from any branch office.
all.zh: 偏好紙本問卷的顧客可至任何分公司索取列印版本。

all.en: The questionnaire is available in English, traditional Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.
all.zh: 問卷提供英文、繁體中文、日文與韓文等版本。

all.en: Please save your progress periodically if you need to step away from your computer.
all.zh: 若您需要暫時離開電腦，請定時儲存作答進度。

all.en: We have streamlined the layout this year to make navigation easier on mobile devices.
all.zh: 今年我們已優化版面，方便您在行動裝置上瀏覽作答。

all.en: Frontline staff will undergo additional training based on your most frequent suggestions.
all.zh: 前線同仁將依據您最常提出的建議接受額外訓練。

all.en: Senior leadership commits to publishing an action plan within sixty days of survey closure.
all.zh: 公司高層承諾於問卷結束六十天內公布行動方案。

all.en: Your continued partnership enables us to deliver better products and reliable service every day.
all.zh: 您持續的支持讓我們得以每日提供更優質的產品與穩定的服務。

all.en: Focus group sessions are scheduled in major cities for customers who wish to share deeper insights.
all.zh: 我們將在主要城市舉辦焦點訪談，邀請願意分享深入觀點的顧客參加。

all.en: Participants in focus groups receive a fifty dollar service credit applied to their account.
all.zh: 焦點訪談參與者將獲得五十美元的服務抵用金存入帳戶。

all.en: An accessibility-friendly version of the survey supports screen readers and high-contrast viewing.
all.zh: 問卷亦提供無障礙版本，支援螢幕閱讀器與高對比檢視。

all.en: Honest negative feedback is just as valuable to us as positive comments and praise.
all.zh: 誠實的負面回饋對我們而言與正面評價同等重要。

all.en: All personal data submitted through the survey is protected by industry-standard encryption protocols.
all.zh: 問卷所提交的個人資料皆受業界標準的加密機制保護。

all.en: A dedicated analytics team will compile responses and identify the top three priority improvement areas.
all.zh: 專屬分析團隊將彙整回覆並找出前三大優先改善領域。

all.en: Customers may opt to be notified personally when their suggested improvements are implemented.
all.zh: 顧客可選擇於其建議獲得採納實施時收到個別通知。

all.en: Community town hall meetings will be hosted virtually to discuss the survey findings in depth.
all.zh: 我們將舉辦線上市民會議，深入討論本次問卷調查的結果。

all.en: Our service quality scorecard will be updated quarterly and shared with all participating customers.
all.zh: 服務品質計分表將每季更新，並寄送給所有參與問卷的顧客。

all.en: Together, we can shape the future direction of Brightway Communications for years to come.
all.zh: 讓我們攜手共同形塑 Brightway Communications 未來多年的發展方向。
